Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Use time compression to move the scenario along until your units are both within range.

For the purposes of this tutorial, we have placed the K-175 about 300nm away from Varyag, allowing us to coordinate a multi-axis strike. This is especially important when attacking units with high air-defense capability, such as the US Ticonderoga-class or the USSR Udaloy-class.
